headline: DXC ServiceNow AI Pact Puts Automation And Valuation Case In Focus
summary: DXC Technology (NYSE:DXC) has entered a multi year partnership with ServiceNow to deploy advanced AI automation across its enterprise. DXC is the first global enterprise to adopt ServiceNow’s new agentic AI tools within the Core Business Suite. The agreement focuses on using AI driven automation to streamline internal operations and support future client facing solutions. For investors watching enterprise IT services, DXC Technology sits at the intersection of infrastructure management,...

headline: Dow spikes by over 1,300, oil prices retreat in ceasefire rally
summary: All three of the major indexes (^DJI, ^IXIC, ^GSPC) closed Wednesday's session with colossal gains — the Dow Jones Industrial Average skyrocketed by over 1,320 points (2.85%) and the Nasdaq Composite surged by nearly 620 points (2.8%) — after President Trump announced that Iran agreed to a two-week ceasefire last night. Yahoo Finance Markets and Data Editor Jared Blikre takes a closer look at the trading day's biggest sector gainers.
